storyInfo: Mon3tr ends the mutated manglerbeast's pain. The trio return to the lab. Mantra confirms the presence of the Yurodstvo in the village and its connection to the Royal Guard. She seems to have found a way out of the current situation.

attributes.content: I think so...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The roaring and the heavy breathing have ceased. Did we kill it?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But it's still standing—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Don't move! I'll check.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Mon3tr ascertains that the other two are at a safe distance, and approaches it on her own.

The manglerbeast stands quietly, no sign of the madness that had engulfed it only moments ago, its strange forelimbs hanging still in front of its body. Part of the Originium covering it has been chipped away.
Mon3tr approaches carefully.
She observes the manglerbeast. It was dangerous to begin with, and its mutations make it look strange, almost otherworldly.
The influence of Originium is turning it into a 'human' physiologically...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It must be in a great deal of pain...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Oh—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: But the manglerbeast does not attack or even move from its spot. It falls toward the ground—
Until its forelimbs touch the ground again with a thud.

attributes.options: Now's our chance to leave, Mon3tr.;We should leave and go back to the lab, now.

attributes.content: No, Doctor.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It's still breathing!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: And it sounds like it's... in pain? I think.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I can't sense another's emotions like Amiya can, and this is just a mutated animal. But...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I know it will die, even if we don't do anything.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The Originium has impaled its throat. Every part of its body is in pain. It would claw out its own mutated organs if it could.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Perhaps this is why it attacked us. It's not in control of itself anymore.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I can do it. I can...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: End its pain.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: She walks towards the fallen beast. Standing next to it, she puts her claws against a piece of fur with fewer crystals.
Mon3tr gazes at the manglerbeast with incredible calm in her eyes.
Then, she surgically extinguishes the mutated manglerbeast's last, intermittent breathing.
Let's go, Doctor.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Back to the lab.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Mantra continues to listen.
She knows she cannot trust what she sees, whether it is twisted by intention, or reflecting reality by accident.
And so she listens, until the first word of prayer drops in the crowd like the first snow.
Yurodstvo...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'Gabrielus.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Then stop.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Stop—
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Stop it all!
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.text: I cannot stop what never began.
What you see is only in your mind.

attributes.content: Mantra stops trying to communicate. She steps forward and tries to steady the trembling red, white and black threads.
As she stretches out her hand—
—Mantra—
attributes.name: Flickering Voice

attributes.content: Mantra!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You were completely motionless.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I've never seen you like this... what happened?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Did you hear that?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Hear what?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The old woman does not immediately answer.
She looks around and realizes that the remaining miners look different from before. She frowns and glances around herself.
Where is Eloysius?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: She heard me and ran outside.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: So you did tell us to leave.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yes, but I don't remember why... this is strange.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Mental Arts.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Are you sure? I've received specific training. I would not be defenseless against such attacks.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Check for short-term memory interference, Raidian.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What sort of interference?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Interference that I can create.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: One time, I had Mechanist forget that he wanted to ask you about borrowing Dendie and Axie. Not by wiping the memory, but by blocking its formation.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I remember... that was the first time you tried to use your Arts like that, I think? We forget when information in our brain is not successfully stored in the memory.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Yes. It was your idea. You are far more experienced than I am in the understanding and utilization of human bioelectrical signals.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You think someone here uses the same sort of Arts?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Unsure. Perhaps I just saw and heard more than you did.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The Yurodstvo of Ursus may be here, Raidian.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yurodstvo? Why do you bring that up—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The Yurodstvo is here? But the last Yurodstvo was burned alive in Grypherburg two years ago. Could another be born so soon?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I don't know. I'm going to find out.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: If it's really the Yurodstvo, and it was hidden in the group, without me detecting it... then it's extremely dangerous.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I'll put the others on alert. Be careful.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The danger is not physical. Not yet, at least.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I'll seek help if necessary.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Don't forget it.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Mantra turns around and walks towards the place where the red was, a few moments ago.
The assembled miners either give way to her, or reach out to her.
Who are you... looking for?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We're still going, to Grypherburg, right?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We'll l-live...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But they look like, they don't want, to leave? I asked Dyadya Volya. He doesn't want, to leave.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: He'd rather, his wounds rot, than to run.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: But isn't surviving, the most important thing?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're not, talking...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Stranger.
attributes.name: Tired Miner

attributes.content: Are you going to see Nadia? Then go on your knees, and raise your eyes to her.
attributes.name: Tired Miner

attributes.content: See her, repent, and be forgiven. Then you will realize how foolish you were, for struggling and failing to find peace.
attributes.name: Tired Miner

attributes.content: Mantra neither assents nor dissents. She does not speak to them with Arts. She simply nods and passes them by, staring straight into the deepest reaches of the room.
You will understand... when you are in her presence.
attributes.name: Tired Miner

attributes.content: A hunched, tiny grey-white figure sits at the end of the room like a statue.
—Yurodstvo?!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Impossible. It's impossible! The Yurodstvo is dead!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Tsar granted the madman the mercy of defending himself before his sentence was pronounced.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Seven days! He engaged in sophistry for seven days without stopping, without eating or drinking.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: He had the audacity to stand in the middle of the State Council, telling everyone who came to listen—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: 'I forgive you.'
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: His Imperial Majesty finally had enough and sentenced him to death, personally, but brainwashed believers attempted to raid the execution, resulting in the biggest riot in Grypherburg in a decade.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We know all that.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: If Mantra said it was the Yurodstvo, she must have had the evidence to make the deduction.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: All we need to do is protect ourselves and wait to hear from her.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Mantra does not kneel as the miners instructed.
She steps into the shadow, facing forward, as though there are a pair of eyes looking backwards in front of her.
I know you can 'hear'.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I hope you're more than just a pale imitation of my Arts and my way of speaking, Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'Yurodstvo'... if that is the name you need me to have.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: Explain.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Gabrielus, Solomida, Bessmert, Aurora, Nadia... or, perhaps, Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: I am all of them.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: Why did you hide amongst these suffering people?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Because it is a journey of proselytization.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: I shall walk this vast land and redeem the people from their sufferings.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: And because I saw and heard her.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: I stayed because of her pain.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: Who is she?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: A suffering soul.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: You deceived her and made her call you 'Nadia'?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I never deceived.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: You lie.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: She asked as you did. I answered as I do.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: That was all.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: A meaningless response. What are you?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You saw me.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: I see shadow without order.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yes, I am.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: But not in the eyes of others.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Explain.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: People see in me the reflection of their perception and expectation.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: I thought, of all the souls, you alone would understand why I exist so.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: After all...
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: You are the unfinished sculpture. You were once to become—
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: 'Me.'
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: Mantra keeps her eyes fixed on the strange apparition in front of her, but she is unsure whether she can identify any useful information from it.
A long time ago, you cut away a black piece of rotten flesh.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: So did I. It pursued me, and I repelled it, like cutting off a piece of rotten flesh between breaths.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: An absurd analogy.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No, a simple principle.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: If it is rotten and no longer connected to the rest of your body...
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: Why keep it?
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: This is...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Your memory?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But it is mine—
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No. The Royal Guard... if you can influence a Royal Guard, you can influence the miners.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You killed it. You became me.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: If this is the only thing we share in common...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The body, and rotten flesh. Your relationship to the Royal Guard—the Yurodstvo was the source of the Royal Guard experiments.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No sound comes from the trembling shadows, neither affirmation nor denial.
Mantra begins to back off and leaves the shadow's edge.
...I need support, Raidian.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I'm here.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The conjecture is confirmed.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Also, additional information...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The Yurodstvo hid amongst the miners and helped them kill the Royal Guard.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: ...I see.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What do you need us to do?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I need you to continue to contact other Rhodes Island assets in Ursus, and ask Amiya to delay Eloysius.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We can't leave yet, at least not until I find a way to rouse the miners.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Have Elysium standby inside the range of my Arts. I may need his assistance.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What's your plan?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Remove the influence that the Yurodstvo has on the miners.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You think the Yurodstvo is controlling the miners and causing them to refuse to leave?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We cannot kill the Yurodstvo directly, but it can kill anyone here, anytime it chooses to.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Maybe Amiya can help.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Maybe. But Amiya does not understand the Yurodstvo, and I do not want to her to become involved without any understanding.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The Yurodstvo's powers are similar to mine. This is why I am the only one who can make this decision.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: It relies on the cognition of others to establish itself. I must find the key to its establishment of the 'Nadia' identity, in order to remove its influence.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You have someone you suspect.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra casts her gaze at the surrounding miners, and eventually upon the girl who walks past her to the Yurodstvo.
She mutters in a daze, in bewilderment and sorrow.
I just need time to confirm.
attributes.name: Mantra
